nodes.label: PythaFlow AI Concierge (marketing)
nodes.rationale: Marketed as the AI concierge for restaurants & hotels that never sleeps - answers guests, books reservations, supports staff after hours, hands off to a human, multilingual.

nodes.label: Hero Conversation Player
nodes.rationale: WhatsApp-styled looping chat of a guest booking a table (asks -> concierge offers a time -> books -> confirms); pauses off-screen, renders static under reduced-motion.
